Package org.racore.core.responses

Class ResponseWriters

java.lang.Object
org.racore.core.responses.ResponseWriters

  • Method Details

    • stream

      public static void stream(HttpExchange exchange, int statusCode, StreamingResponse body) throws IOException
      Throws:
      IOException

    • sse

      public static void sse(HttpExchange exchange, int statusCode, StreamingResponse body) throws IOException
      Throws:
      IOException

    • sendJsonResponse

      public static void sendJsonResponse(HttpExchange exchange, int statusCode, Object response) throws IOException
      Sends a JSON response using the provided HttpExchange.

      This method sets the Content-Type header to application/json, serializes the response object to JSON, and then delegates to sendResponse(HttpExchange, int, String).

      Note: Using this method directly implies you are manually handling the request and will bypass any post-interceptors. It is recommended that you return Handled.INSTANCE from your request handler to indicate you have fully handled the operation.

      Parameters:
      exchange - the HttpExchange to send the response to
      statusCode - the HTTP status code to return
      response - the response object to be serialized as JSON
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs while writing the response

    • sendResponse

      public static void sendResponse(HttpExchange exchange, int statusCode, String response) throws IOException
      Sends a plain text (or any custom format) response using the provided HttpExchange.

      This method writes the given response string to the response body and then closes the output stream.

      Note: Using this method directly implies you are manually handling the request and will bypass any post-interceptors. It is recommended that you return Handled.INSTANCE from your request handler to indicate you have fully handled the operation.

      Parameters:
      exchange - the HttpExchange to send the response to
      statusCode - the HTTP status code to return
      response - the response payload as a String
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs while writing the response
